steps.t: A band of Rohirrim from the Wold have made camp in the East Wall south-west of the Argonath and the entrance to the Wold, in the stretch of land that …
Rohirrim injured in the recent battle with the Orcs need your help to be made more comfortable. Wounded Rohirrim can be found throughout their camp.
Céolbald can be found within the Rohirrim camp in the East Wall, in the swath of land that leads to the Norcrofts. You have seen to the comfort of sev…
